title: ajuga austroiranica
intro: Ajuga austroiranica, also known as Ajuga or Bugleweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the mountainous regions of Iran. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ajuga austroiranica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ajuga austroiranica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
